title: The Fifteen Puzzle
description: Slide the tiles back into numerical order. A pure puzzle of logic and spatial reasoning.

title: Freethinking Trivia
description: Ten questions spanning philosophy, science, and the history of ideas. Answer carefully.

title: Word Scramble
description: Reconstruct a famous freethinking quote from its scrambled words.

title: Crossy Road
description: Help a small dog cross a busy road. One hop at a time. Don't get hit.
